payload.answer: I can’t commit this as a durable memory here, but I can offer repair options for how to represent it.
citations: User input: "I prefer Sonny Rollins over John Coltrane for relaxed Sunday listening."
repair_options: Keep this as a standalone preference: Sonny Rollins is preferred over John Coltrane for relaxed Sunday listening.
Record it as an additive preference without changing any existing jazz preferences.
If there is already a broader jazz preference on file, keep both and distinguish this as a context-specific Sunday-listening preference.
If you meant to revise a prior preference, specify which earlier preference should be corrected or superseded.
